buoy
  • API Reference
  • View page source

API Reference

class buoy.Aframe(model_weights='aframe.pt', config='aframe_config.yaml', device=None, revision=None, load_weights=True, cache_dir=None)[source]

Bases: AframeConfig, BuoyModel

Aframe neural network model for gravitational wave detection.

Wraps a trained TorchScript model and its associated preprocessing pipeline. Config attributes (sample_rate, psd_length, etc.) are always loaded; neural network weights are only loaded when load_weights=True.

property time_offset: float

Estimate the time offset between the peak of the integrated outputs and the merger time of the signal

property minimum_data_size: int

The minimum length of data, in samples, required for the model to run with its current configuration

class buoy.AframeConfig(sample_rate, kernel_length, psd_length, fduration, highpass, fftlength, inference_sampling_rate, offline_sampling_rate, batch_size, aframe_right_pad, integration_window_length, lowpass=None)[source]

Bases: object

class buoy.Amplfi(model_weights='amplfi-hlv.ckpt', config='amplfi-hlv-config.yaml', device=None, revision=None, load_weights=True, cache_dir=None)[source]

Bases: AmplfiConfig, BuoyModel

AMPLFI normalizing-flow model for rapid gravitational wave parameter estimation.

Wraps a trained Lightning checkpoint and its associated preprocessing pipeline. Config attributes are always loaded; the flow weights are only loaded when load_weights=True.

property minimum_data_size: int

Minimum data size required for the model to run.

class buoy.AmplfiConfig(architecture, parameter_sampler, sample_rate, kernel_length, inference_params, event_position, psd_length, fduration, fftlength, highpass, lowpass=None)[source]

Bases: object

buoy.main(events, outdir, samples_per_event=20000, nside=64, min_samples_per_pix=5, use_distance=True, aframe_weights=None, amplfi_hl_weights=None, amplfi_hlv_weights=None, aframe_config=None, amplfi_hl_config=None, amplfi_hlv_config=None, aframe_revision=None, amplfi_revision=None, model_cache_dir=None, use_true_tc_for_amplfi=False, ifos=None, device=None, to_html=False, seed=None, verbose=False, run_aframe=True, run_amplfi=True, generate_plots=True, force=False, corner_parameters=None)[source]

Main function to run Aframe and AMPLFI on the given events and produce output plots.

Parameters:

  • events (str | list[str]) – Gravitational wave event name(s) to process. Accepts known event names (e.g. GW150914), GraceDB events (e.g. G363842), GraceDB superevents (e.g. S200213t), or GPS times (e.g. 1187008882.4).

  • outdir (Path) – Output directory to save results.

  • samples_per_event (int) – Number of samples for AMPLFI to generate for each event.

  • nside (int) – Healpix resolution for AMPLFI skymap

  • min_samples_per_pix (int) – Minimum number of samples per healpix pixel required to estimate parameters of the distance ansatz

  • use_distance (bool) – If true, use distance samples to create a 3D skymap

  • aframe_weights (Path | None) – Path to Aframe model weights. Can be a local path or in the ML4GW/aframe Hugging Face repository.

  • amplfi_hl_weights (Path | None) – Path to AMPLFI HL model weights. Can be a local path or in the ML4GW/amplfi Hugging Face repository.

  • amplfi_hlv_weights (Path | None) – Path to AMPLFI HLV model weights. Can be a local path or in the ML4GW/amplfi Hugging Face repository.

  • aframe_config (Path | None) – Path to Aframe config file. Can be a local path or in the ML4GW/aframe Hugging Face repository.

  • amplfi_hl_config (Path | None) – Path to AMPLFI HL config file. Can be a local path or in the ML4GW/amplfi Hugging Face repository.

  • amplfi_hlv_config (Path | None) – Path to AMPLFI HLV config file. Can be a local path or in the ML4GW/amplfi Hugging Face repository.

  • aframe_revision (str | None) – HuggingFace repository revision (branch, tag, or commit hash) for Aframe model weights and config. If None, uses the default branch.

  • amplfi_revision (str | None) – HuggingFace repository revision (branch, tag, or commit hash) for AMPLFI model weights and config. If None, uses the default branch.

  • model_cache_dir (Path | None) – Local directory to use as the HuggingFace download cache for model weights and configs. If None, uses the default HuggingFace cache location (~/.cache/huggingface).

  • use_true_tc_for_amplfi (bool) – If True, use the true time of coalescence for AMPLFI. Else, use the merger time inferred from Aframe.

  • ifos (list[str] | None) – List of detectors to use when fetching data for a GPS time event. Ignored for named events (GW/G/S), which look up detectors automatically. Defaults to [“H1”, “L1”, “V1”].

  • device (str | None) – Device to run the models on (“cpu” or “cuda”).

  • to_html (bool) – If True, generate an HTML summary page.

  • seed (int | None) – Random seed for reproducibility of AMPLFI results.

  • verbose (bool) – If True, log at the DEBUG level. Else, log at INFO level.

  • run_aframe (bool) – If True, run Aframe inference and save outputs. If False, load previously saved Aframe outputs if available.

  • run_amplfi (bool) – If True, run AMPLFI inference and save posterior samples. If False, skip parameter estimation and PE plots.

  • generate_plots (bool) – If True, generate all output plots. If False, skip plotting.

  • force (bool) – If True, reprocess events even if output files already exist. If False, skip events whose inference outputs are all present.

  • corner_parameters (list[str] | None) – List of parameter names to include in the AMPLFI corner plot. Defaults to [“chirp_mass”, “mass_ratio”, “distance”, “mass_1”, “mass_2”].

  • Models
  • Utilities
